title: Ukraine Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income — Annex ЄСВ1 (Calculation of Accrued Income of Insured Persons and Accrued Unified Social Contribution)
description: The State Tax Service of Ukraine's (Державна податкова служба України, DPS) "Додаток ЄСВ1 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи" (Annex ЄСВ1 to the Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income) — the "Розрахунок сум нарахованого доходу застрахованих осіб та суми нарахованого єдиного внеску" (calculation of the amounts of accrued income of insured persons and the amount of accrued unified social contribution, ЄСВ), the primary/default ЄСВ calculation schedule for individual entrepreneurs, independent professionals, and farming-enterprise members, filed for the same reporting year as the main declaration. Tenth and last of the ten companion schedules disclosed as open backlog when the parent declaration (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3531) was authored, and the tenth and final of those ten to be modelled, after Annex АП (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-ap, GOV-3588), Annex Ф4 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f4, GOV-3623), Annex МПЗ (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-mpz, GOV-3632), Annex Ф1 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f1, GOV-3641), Annex КІК (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-kik, GOV-3907/GOV-3996), Annex Ф2 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f2, GOV-4002/GOV-4004), Annex ЄСВ3 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-esv3, GOV-4010), Annex Ф3 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-f3, GOV-4017/GOV-4019), and Annex ЄСВ2 (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-esv2, GOV-4026). This closes out the entire disclosed ten-schedule companion-series backlog to the parent declaration. Approved within the same combined Excel template as the main declaration, by Order of the Ministry of Finance of Ukraine No. 859 of 2 October 2015, as amended by Order No. 119 of 26 February 2025 (the edition modelled here, effective for reporting periods from 1 January 2026). Published, unauthenticated, directly by the State Tax Service on tax.gov.ua as a legacy Excel (.xls) template's own dedicated 'ЄСВ 1' sheet. This v1.0.0 models the sheet in full: the taxpayer-identification header (including a second, Pension-Fund-specific passport identifier and a direct full-name field, shared with Annex ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3), a genuinely three-value declarationType (matching the majority UA DPS annex convention, unlike its two 'ЄСВ' siblings' own two-value enum), two distinct period-entry boxes (a reporting period and a second, genuinely fillable 'period being corrected' box — a structural departure from ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3, where the equivalent header text is non-fillable), a cessation/deregistration date split into число/місяць/рік integer fields, a main-economic-activity-code field unique to this schedule, a repeat-filing sequence number, four filer-type/period-of-stay row pairs (one of which duplicates another's own label verbatim, a disclosed source-text anomaly), a three-value selectable form-type field (unlike ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3's own single fixed value), and the fixed twelve-month table (one row per calendar month, each carrying an insured-person category code, a net income amount, a contribution-base amount, a contribution rate, and a resulting contribution amount — a five-column table, the widest of any UA DPS annex's own monthly table, with an explicit per-row multiplication formula stated in its own column-6 header) plus its own total row. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Ukraine or the State Tax Service of Ukraine.

authority.name: Державна податкова служба України (State Tax Service of Ukraine)

source.documentRef: Форма Додатка ЄСВ1 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи, затверджена наказом Міністерства фінансів України від 02.10.2015 № 859 (у редакції наказу від 26.02.2025 № 119), чинна з 01.01.2026 — аркуш 'ЄСВ 1'

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4037 (child of GOV-4035), deepening Ukraine's own disclosed Taxes backlog by authoring the tenth and final of ten companion schedules to ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration (GOV-3531): Annex ЄСВ1 (the primary/default calculation of accrued income of insured persons and accrued unified social contribution), after Annex АП, Annex Ф4, Annex МПЗ, Annex Ф1, Annex КІК, Annex Ф2, Annex ЄСВ3, Annex Ф3, and Annex ЄСВ2. This closes Ukraine's entire disclosed ten-schedule companion series. Re-fetched the same source workbook the parent declaration and all nine prior annexes cite (via the same timestamped Wayback Machine snapshot, since tax.gov.ua itself still 403s direct sandbox fetches), confirmed byte-identical to the previously recorded sha256 (7c67f4c421a1a8fc610f9226819d223debcb56b3fd1fc3d5f75ce0247cc7f0ac) across eleven cycles now. Parsed the workbook's own 'ЄСВ 1' sheet (!ref A1:CA244, 241 merges — pre-sized by the GOV-4010 cycle) cell-by-cell with the xlsx npm package, cross-referencing the sheet's own !merges array to resolve exactly which column range each label and input cell spans, confirming the sheet's actual printed content ends at row 109 despite the !ref's own 244-row declared extent (rows 110-244 are blank print-area padding, the same pattern found on every prior UA DPS annex sized this way). Models the sheet in full, disclosing several genuine structural findings rather than assuming identity with its closest 'ЄСВ' siblings: a three-value declarationType (matching the majority UA DPS annex convention, unlike ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3's own two-value enum); a second, genuinely fillable 'period being corrected' entry box confirmed via its own dedicated digit-entry cell merges (unlike ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3's own non-fillable equivalent header fragment); the complete absence of a calculationYear-equivalent field, since this schedule covers the same reporting year as the main declaration rather than a distinct audit/voluntary-participation year; a cessation/deregistration date split into число/місяць/рік integer fields; a main-economic-activity-code field unique to this schedule; four filer-type/period-of-stay row pairs, one of which (row 51) duplicates another's own label (row 49) byte-for-byte — a genuine source-text anomaly disclosed rather than silently corrected; a three-value selectable formType field (unlike ЄСВ2/ЄСВ3's own single fixed 'Тип форми' value); and a five-column monthly table (the widest of any UA DPS annex's own monthly table) whose own column-6 header states an explicit 'графа 4 × графа 5' multiplication formula — not encoded as crossFieldValidation given the shape's two-field-only comparison support and a genuine percentage-vs-fraction scaling ambiguity. Both validators pass at 556/556; 9 conformance fixtures. See the Taxes vertical section below and the document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full record.

fields.name: taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport
fields.label: Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта
fields.description: The taxpayer's registration number of the taxpayer account card (RNOKPP), or — for individuals who, on religious grounds, have declined a registration number and have a corresponding notation in their passport — their passport series (if any) and number instead, matching the same either/or convention as ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration's own taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport field and every other authored companion schedule's own equivalent field.
fields.sourceRef: Rows 15-18: '1. Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта (для фізичних осіб, які через свої релігійні переконання відмовляються від прийняття реєстраційного номера облікової картки платника податків та офіційно повідомили про це відповідний контролюючий орган і мають відмітку у паспорті)'

fields.name: pensionFundIdentificationPassport
fields.label: Серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта для ідентифікації платника єдиного внеску у Пенсійному фонді України
fields.description: A second, distinct identification field (not present on the main declaration): the passport series (if any) and number used specifically to identify the unified social contribution (ЄСВ) payer within the Pension Fund of Ukraine's own records, separate from the taxpayer's RNOKPP. Present on this schedule as well as on Annex ЄСВ2 and Annex ЄСВ3, matching the same convention. Footnote * (row 97) gives the expected format for passport-book holders (БКNNXXXXXX) and ID-card holders (ПХХХХХХХХХ).
fields.sourceRef: Rows 20, 23: '2. Серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта для ідентифікації платника єдиного внеску у Пенсійному фонді України*'; footnote * at row 97

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Прізвище (за наявності), ім'я, по батькові (за наявності)
fields.description: The taxpayer's surname, given name, and patronymic (if any), requested directly on this annex (as on Annex ЄСВ2 and Annex ЄСВ3), rather than relying solely on the main declaration's own taxpayerFullName field — consistent with this schedule's own capacity to be filed as its own distinct calculation. Note: the sheet's own printed cell (row 24) literally reads 'імя' without an apostrophe, matching Annex ЄСВ2's own equivalent cell (not Annex ЄСВ3's, which prints 'ім'я' with one) — a minor source-text inconsistency within the same workbook, disclosed here rather than silently normalized; the field's own label above uses the standard orthography.
fields.sourceRef: Row 24: '3. Прізвище (за наявності), імя, по батькові (за наявності)' (verbatim, including the source's own missing apostrophe)

fields.name: declarationType
fields.label: Тип декларації
fields.description: original = 'Звітна' (a regular declaration for the reporting period); revised_original = 'Звітна нова' (a new original filed to supersede a previously filed original for the same period, before the filing deadline); corrective = 'Уточнююча' (a correction to a previously filed declaration for a past period). This is a genuinely three-value enum — unlike Annex ЄСВ2 and Annex ЄСВ3 (both two-value, original/revised_original only) — confirmed via a full non-empty-cell dump of the sheet's entire printed extent (rows 1-109), which found three checkbox/label pairs. This matches the three-value convention shared by every other authored UA DPS annex (Annex АП, Ф1-Ф4, МПЗ, КІК) rather than the two-value convention its closest 'ЄСВ' siblings share — consistent with ЄСВ1 being the primary/default ЄСВ calculation schedule rather than a scenario-specific adjustment (see this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed absence of a calculationYear-equivalent field).
fields.sourceRef: Row 28/31: 'Тип декларації:' — Звітна (C31:D31 checkbox, E31:H31 label) / Звітна нова (I31:J31 checkbox, K31:Q31 label) / Уточнююча (R31:S31 checkbox, T31 label)

fields.name: reportingPeriodYear
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період: рік
fields.description: The calendar year in which this calculation is filed. Footnote 2 (row 99) scopes this box (along with reportingPeriodMonth below) to two alternative scenarios: a declaration of type 'original'/'revised original' marked 'довідкова' (informational/reference) for form type 'pension assignment' or 'material-support/insurance-payment assignment', or the year of a state cessation-registration event when filing with form type 'after cessation' (an alternative reading also covered by cessationOrDeregistrationYear below — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed overlap).
fields.sourceRef: Row 31, columns AK-AX (digit-entry boxes, 'рік' label at AV31:AX31): 'Звітний (податковий) період:' — рік2; footnote 2 at row 99

fields.name: reportingPeriodMonth
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період: місяць
fields.description: The calendar month number (1-12) in which this calculation is filed, per footnote 1 (row 98): filled in by individual entrepreneurs, independent professionals, or farming-enterprise members, in an 'original' or 'revised original' declaration, in case form type 'pension assignment' or 'material-support/insurance-payment assignment' is specified — the same 'Довідкова' period-month gating convention this registry established for ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-ap and reused for Annex Ф2, Annex ЄСВ2, and Annex ЄСВ3, applied here to this schedule's own pension/material-support-assignment scope.
fields.sourceRef: Row 35, columns AK-AT (digit-entry boxes, 'Довідкова1' at F35, 'місяць' label at AQ35:AT35): footnote 1 at row 98

fields.name: correctedPeriodYear
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється: рік
fields.description: A second, genuinely distinct year-entry box, confirmed via its own dedicated digit-entry cell merges (columns BC-BS), separate from reportingPeriodYear above — corresponding to the header's own second column group, 'Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється:' (the reporting period being corrected/clarified). This is a genuine structural departure from Annex ЄСВ2 and Annex ЄСВ3, where the equivalent header text is a stray label fragment with no adjacent input-cell merges at all (confirmed non-fillable on those two sheets); on this sheet, real digit-entry box merges exist for both column groups. The exact scoping split between this box and reportingPeriodYear is not fully confirmed from cell text alone — both carry the same footnote 2 marker, whose own text bundles two scenarios together — disclosed as a genuine ambiguity rather than guessed; see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Row 31, columns BC-BS (digit-entry boxes, 'рік' label at BR31:BS31): 'Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється:' (AA28) — рік2; footnote 2 at row 99

fields.name: correctedPeriodMonth
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється: місяць
fields.description: A second, genuinely distinct month-entry box (columns BF-BO), the month-level counterpart to correctedPeriodYear above. Unlike reportingPeriodMonth's own 'Довідкова1' prefix, this box's own label carries no footnote marker of its own — its scope is inferred from footnote 2's own compound text (which mentions a calendar month alongside the year for its second, cessation-registration scenario), disclosed as a genuine ambiguity rather than guessed; see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Row 35, columns BF-BO (digit-entry boxes, 'місяць' label at BL35:BO35)

fields.name: cessationOrDeregistrationDay
fields.label: Дата державної реєстрації припинення або дата подання заяви про зняття з обліку: число
fields.description: The day-of-month of the state registration of cessation of business/independent-professional/farm-enterprise-member activity, or of the filer's own submission to the controlling authority of an application for deregistration as a unified social contribution (ЄСВ) payer — whichever applies. Unlike this schedule's other date-shaped fields, this one is split into separate число (day)/місяць (month)/рік (year) integer fields, since the sheet explicitly prints those three sub-labels for this entry (matching Annex ЄСВ3's own auditActDay/Month/Year convention).
fields.sourceRef: Row 38-39, column AK-AS ('число' label at AQ38:AS38): '5. Дата державної реєстрації припинення або дата подання до контролюючого органу заяви про зняття з обліку платника єдиного внеску'

fields.name: cessationOrDeregistrationMonth
fields.label: Дата державної реєстрації припинення або дата подання заяви про зняття з обліку: місяць
fields.description: The month of the same state-registration-of-cessation or deregistration-application date described by cessationOrDeregistrationDay above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 38, columns AU-AY ('місяць' label at BA38:BD38)

fields.name: cessationOrDeregistrationYear
fields.label: Дата державної реєстрації припинення або дата подання заяви про зняття з обліку: рік
fields.description: The year of the same state-registration-of-cessation or deregistration-application date described by cessationOrDeregistrationDay above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 38, columns BF-BP ('рік' label at BR38:BS38)

fields.name: mainEconomicActivityCode
fields.label: Код основного виду економічної діяльності
fields.description: The taxpayer's main economic activity code (КВЕД), printed with a literal decimal-point separator cell (column BK) between digit groups — modelled as a free string rather than a fixed numeric pattern, since this cycle could not independently confirm the exact digit-grouping from cell/merge structure alone. A field unique to this schedule among this registry's authored UA DPS annexes — no sibling schedule requests an economic-activity code.
fields.sourceRef: Row 42, column BK ('.' separator at BK42): '6. Код основного виду економічної діяльності'

fields.name: calculationSequenceNumber
fields.label: Номер розрахунку в періоді
fields.description: The sequential number of this calculation among possibly several ЄСВ1 calculations attached to the same declaration, per footnote 3 (row 100): filled in by individual entrepreneurs, independent professionals, or farming-enterprise members in case of repeated state registration of cessation, or repeated submission of an application for deregistration as a unified social contribution payer, within one reporting period (footnote 3's own text states the value ranges from 2 to 9).
fields.sourceRef: Row 45: '7. Номер розрахунку в періоді3'; footnote 3 at row 100

fields.name: individualEntrepreneurGeneralSystemFromMonth
fields.label: ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування: з (місяць)
fields.description: The starting calendar month of the period during the reporting year in which the filer held individual-entrepreneur status under the general taxation system ('ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування'), the first of section 8's four filer-type/period-of-stay rows.
fields.sourceRef: Row 49, column AD ('з' label): '8. Тип платника та період перебування (місяць):' — 'ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування'

fields.name: individualEntrepreneurGeneralSystemToMonth
fields.label: ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування: по (місяць)
fields.description: The ending calendar month of the same period described by individualEntrepreneurGeneralSystemFromMonth above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 49, column AY ('по' label)

fields.name: individualEntrepreneurSecondCategoryFromMonth
fields.label: ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування: з (місяць)
fields.description: The starting calendar month of the period during the reporting year in which the filer held the second of section 8's four filer-type categories. Genuine source-text anomaly disclosed: this row's own printed label (row 51) is byte-for-byte identical to individualEntrepreneurGeneralSystemFromMonth's own row-49 label ('ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування') — confirmed via a codepoint-level comparison of both raw cell strings, not merely a visual read. Given the standard Ukrainian individual-entrepreneur tax-regime distinction (general vs. simplified taxation systems) and this row's position as the second of four otherwise-distinct filer categories, this is presumably intended to denote individual entrepreneurs on the simplified taxation system, but this cycle could not confirm that intent from the sheet's own printed text, which literally repeats the general-system wording — disclosed here rather than silently corrected or guessed; see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Row 51, column AD ('з' label): '8. Тип платника та період перебування (місяць):' — 'ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування' (verbatim duplicate of row 49's own label)

fields.name: individualEntrepreneurSecondCategoryToMonth
fields.label: ФО – на загальній системі оподаткування: по (місяць)
fields.description: The ending calendar month of the same period described by individualEntrepreneurSecondCategoryFromMonth above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 51, column AY ('по' label)

fields.label: Особа, яка провадить незалежну професійну діяльність: з (місяць)
fields.description: The starting calendar month of the period during the reporting year in which the filer held status as a person engaged in independent professional activity, the third of section 8's four filer-type/period-of-stay rows.
fields.sourceRef: Row 53, column AD ('з' label): '8. Тип платника та період перебування (місяць):' — 'Особа, яка провадить незалежну професійну діяльність'

fields.label: Особа, яка провадить незалежну професійну діяльність: по (місяць)
fields.description: The ending calendar month of the same period described by independentProfessionalActivityFromMonth above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 53, column AY ('по' label)

fields.label: Член фермерського господарства: з (місяць)
fields.description: The starting calendar month of the period during the reporting year in which the filer held status as a member of a farming enterprise, the fourth of section 8's four filer-type/period-of-stay rows.
fields.sourceRef: Row 55, column AD ('з' label): '8. Тип платника та період перебування (місяць):' — 'Член фермерського господарства'

fields.name: farmEnterpriseMemberToMonth
fields.label: Член фермерського господарства: по (місяць)
fields.description: The ending calendar month of the same period described by farmEnterpriseMemberFromMonth above.
fields.sourceRef: Row 55, column AY ('по' label)

fields.name: formType
fields.label: Тип форми
fields.description: after_cessation = 'після припинення' (footnote 4: filed by individual entrepreneurs, independent professionals, or farming-enterprise members who registered cessation of business activity, ceased independent professional activity, or lost farm-enterprise-member status, per the insurer registry); pension_assignment = 'призначення пенсії' (footnote 5: filed in case a pension needs to be assigned during the year); material_support_assignment = 'призначення матеріального забезпечення, страхових виплат' (footnote 6: filed in case of assignment of material support or insurance payments under mandatory state social insurance). A genuinely three-value selectable field — a departure from Annex ЄСВ2 and Annex ЄСВ3, whose own analogous 'Тип форми' line each prints only one fixed, non-selectable value.
fields.sourceRef: Row 58/60: '9. Тип форми:' — після припинення4 (E60:Q60), призначення пенсії5 (U60), призначення матеріального забезпечення, страхових виплат6 (AG60:BM60); footnotes 4-6 at rows 101-103

fields.name: januaryInsuredPersonCategory
fields.label: Код категорії застрахованої особи
fields.description: The category code of the insured person for Січень (january), per the sheet's own footnote 7: farm_enterprise_member = '4 – член фермерського господарства' (member of a farming enterprise); individual_entrepreneur_general = '5 – фізична особа – підприємець на загальних підставах' (individual entrepreneur on general grounds); independent_professional = '9 – особа, яка отримує дохід від незалежної професійної діяльності' (person receiving income from independent professional activity). Code 4 shares the same numeric value as Annex ЄСВ3's own equivalent footnote but a genuinely different meaning there (collective_leased_enterprise_member, 'член колективного та орендного підприємства, сільськогосподарського кооперативу') — a distinct enum value name is used here rather than reusing ЄСВ3's own, since this sheet's own footnote text differs.
fields.sourceRef: Row 70 ('Січень'), columns L-T: 'Код категорії застрахованої особи7'; footnote 7 (row 104): '7 Код категорії застрахованої особи: 4 – член фермерського господарства; 5 – фізична особа – підприємець на загальних підставах; 9 – особа, яка отримує дохід від незалежної професійної діяльності.'

fields.name: januaryNetIncomeAmount
fields.label: Сума чистого доходу (прибутку), заявлена в податковій декларації / частка розподіленого доходу
fields.description: The net income (profit) amount declared in the tax return, or the share of distributed income, for Січень (january). This is the table's own column 3 ('графа 3').
fields.sourceRef: Row 70 ('Січень'), columns U-AK: 'Сума чистого доходу (прибутку), заявлена в податковій декларації / частка розподіленого доходу (грн, коп.)'

fields.name: januaryContributionBaseAmount
fields.label: Сума доходу, на яку нараховується єдиний внесок, з урахуванням максимальної величини
fields.description: The income amount on which the unified social contribution (ЄСВ) is calculated for Січень (january), taking into account the maximum base value established by law. This is the table's own column 4 ('графа 4'), the multiplicand in the sheet's own explicit column-6 formula ('графа 4 × графа 5') — see januaryContributionAmount below.
fields.sourceRef: Row 70 ('Січень'), columns AL-BB: 'Сума доходу, на яку нараховується єдиний внесок, з урахуванням максимальної величини (грн, коп.)'

fields.name: januaryContributionRate
fields.label: Розмір єдиного внеску, відсотки
fields.description: The unified social contribution (ЄСВ) rate, in percent, established by law (footnote 8: 'У графі зазначається розмір єдиного внеску, встановлений законом'), applied for Січень (january). This is the table's own column 5 ('графа 5'), the multiplier in the sheet's own explicit column-6 formula.
fields.sourceRef: Row 70 ('Січень'), columns BC-BI: 'Розмір єдиного внеску, відсотки8'; footnote 8 at row 105

fields.name: januaryContributionAmount

Disclosed here rather than guessed; see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
